mapper.insert: INSERT INTO energy_measurements ( plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, created_at ) VALUES ( #{plantId}, #{facilityId}, #{measuredAt}, #{electricityKwh}, #{gasM3}, #{waterTon}, #{solarKwh}, #{peakKw}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, TIMESTAMP(DATE(measured_at), MAKETIME(HOUR(measured_at), 0, 0)) AS measured_hour, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, LAG(electricity_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_electricity_kwh, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton, LAG(solar_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_solar_kwh FROM energy_measurements WHERE measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 ), hourly_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, measured_hour AS summary_at, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_electricity_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN electricity_kwh >= previous_electricity_kwh THEN electricity_kwh - previous_electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS water_ton, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_solar_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN solar_kwh >= previous_solar_kwh THEN solar_kwh - previous_solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS solar_kwh, COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id, measured_hour ) SELECT plant_id, facility_id, 'HOURLY', summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, ROUND(electricity_kwh * 0.47, 2) FROM hourly_usage

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, NULL, 'HOURLY', summary_at, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id, summary_at

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, DATE(measured_at) AS measured_date, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, LAG(electricity_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_electricity_kwh, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton, LAG(solar_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_solar_kwh FROM energy_measurements WHERE measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} ), daily_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, CAST(measured_date AS DATETIME) AS summary_at, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_electricity_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN electricity_kwh >= previous_electricity_kwh THEN electricity_kwh - previous_electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS water_ton, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_solar_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN solar_kwh >= previous_solar_kwh THEN solar_kwh - previous_solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS solar_kwh, COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id, measured_date ) SELECT plant_id, facility_id, 'DAILY', summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, ROUND(electricity_kwh * 0.47, 2) FROM daily_usage

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, NULL, 'DAILY', summary_at, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id, summary_at

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, facility_id, 'MONTHLY', #{from}, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, NULL, 'MONTHLY', #{from}, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'MONTHLY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at = #{from} GROUP BY plant_id
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(es.summary_at) FROM energy_summaries es JOIN facilities f ON f.id = es.facility_id WHERE es.plant_id = #{plantId} AND f.plant_id = #{plantId} AND f.facility_type = #{facilityType} AND f.id >= 10000 AND MOD(f.id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 AND es.summary_type = 'DAILY' ORDER BY es.summary_at DESC, es.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND facility_id IS NULL ORDER BY summary_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS average_kw, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS max_kw FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY summary_at ORDER BY summary_at ASC

SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS average_kw, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS max_kw FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY summary_at ORDER BY summary_at ASC

WITH facility_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0) AS usage_kwh, COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, #{from}, #{to}) <= 1 THEN 'HOURLY' ELSE 'DAILY' END AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id ) SELECT fu.facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, ROUND(fu.usage_kwh, 2) AS usage_kwh, ROUND(fu.peak_kw, 2) AS peak_kw, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(fu.usage_kwh) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE fu.usage_kwh / SUM(fu.usage_kwh) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS share_rate FROM facility_usage fu JOIN facilities f ON f.id = fu.facility_id ORDER BY fu.usage_kwh DESC, fu.peak_kw DESC, fu.facility_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH trend AS ( SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS peak_kw FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, #{from}, #{to}) <= 1 THEN 'HOURLY' ELSE 'DAILY' END AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY summary_at ) SELECT measured_at, peak_kw, ROUND( CASE WHEN #{thresholdKw} = 0 THEN 0 ELSE peak_kw / #{thresholdKw} * 100 END, 1 ) AS peak_usage_rate, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, #{from}, #{to}) <= 1 THEN 60 ELSE 1440 END AS duration_minutes, #{thresholdKw} AS threshold_kw, peak_kw > #{thresholdKw} AS exceeded FROM trend WHERE peak_kw > #{thresholdKw} ORDER BY peak_kw DESC, measured_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH line_facilities AS ( SELECT p.id AS plant_id, p.name AS plant_name, COUNT(f.id) AS facility_count FROM plants p LEFT JOIN facilities f ON f.plant_id = p.id AND f.id >= 10000 AND MOD(f.id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY p.id, p.name ), bucket_facility AS ( SELECT es.plant_id, es.facility_id, es.summary_at AS measured_at, MAX(es.peak_kw) AS max_kw FROM energy_summaries es WHERE es.summary_at >= #{from} AND es.summary_at < #{to} AND es.summary_type = CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, #{from}, #{to}) <= 1 THEN 'HOURLY' ELSE 'DAILY' END AND es.peak_kw IS NOT NULL AND es.facility_id IS NOT NULL AND es.facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(es.facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY es.plant_id, es.facility_id, es.summary_at ), plant_bucket AS ( SELECT plant_id, measured_at, COALESCE(SUM(max_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM bucket_facility GROUP BY plant_id, measured_at ), plant_period AS ( SELECT plant_id, ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS period_peak_kw, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS period_average_kw FROM plant_bucket GROUP BY plant_id ), comparison AS ( SELECT lf.plant_id, lf.plant_name, COALESCE(pp.period_peak_kw, 0) AS period_peak_kw, COALESCE(pp.period_average_kw, 0) AS period_average_kw, ROUND(#{facilityThresholdKw}, 2) AS threshold_kw FROM line_facilities lf LEFT JOIN plant_period pp ON pp.plant_id = lf.plant_id ) SELECT plant_id, plant_name, period_peak_kw, period_average_kw, threshold_kw, ROUND( CASE WHEN threshold_kw = 0 THEN 0 ELSE period_peak_kw / threshold_kw * 100 END, 1 ) AS peak_usage_rate, period_peak_kw > threshold_kw AS exceeded, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY period_peak_kw DESC, plant_id ASC) AS plant_rank FROM comparison ORDER BY plant_rank ASC

WITH line_facilities AS ( SELECT id AS facility_id FROM facilities WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND id >= 10000 AND MOD(id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 ), latest_per_facility AS ( SELECT em.* FROM line_facilities lf JOIN energy_measurements em ON em.id = ( SELECT lookup.id FROM energy_measurements lookup WHERE lookup.plant_id = #{plantId} AND lookup.facility_id = lf.facility_id AND lookup.measured_at >= #{from} AND lookup.measured_at < #{to} ORDER BY lookup.measured_at DESC, lookup.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) SELECT NULL AS id, plant_id, NULL AS facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0) AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0) AS water_ton, COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0) AS solar_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw, NULL AS created_at FROM latest_per_facility GROUP BY plant_id

WITH plant_bucket AS ( SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0), 2) AS peak_kw FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND facility_id >= 10000 AND MOD(facility_id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 GROUP BY summary_at ) SELECT measured_at, peak_kw FROM plant_bucket ORDER BY peak_kw DESC, measured_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(electricity_kwh, 0), 4) AS usage_kwh FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} AND COALESCE(electricity_kwh, 0) > 0 ORDER BY summary_at ASC

SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(gas_m3, 0), 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(water_ton, 0), 2) AS water_usage_ton FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} ORDER BY summary_at ASC

SELECT summary_at AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(gas_m3, 0), 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(water_ton, 0), 2) AS water_usage_ton FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} ORDER BY summary_at ASC

WITH line_facilities AS ( SELECT p.id AS plant_id, p.name AS plant_name FROM plants p ), plant_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), 2) AS water_usage_ton FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, #{from}, #{to}) <= 1 THEN 'HOURLY' ELSE 'DAILY' END AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id ), comparison AS ( SELECT lf.plant_id, lf.plant_name, COALESCE(pu.gas_usage_m3, 0) AS gas_usage_m3, COALESCE(pu.water_usage_ton, 0) AS water_usage_ton FROM line_facilities lf LEFT JOIN plant_usage pu ON pu.plant_id = lf.plant_id ) SELECT plant_id, plant_name, gas_usage_m3, water_usage_ton, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(gas_usage_m3) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE gas_usage_m3 / SUM(gas_usage_m3) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS gas_share_rate, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(water_usage_ton) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE water_usage_ton / SUM(water_usage_ton) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS water_share_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY gas_usage_m3 DESC, plant_id ASC) AS gas_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY water_usage_ton DESC, plant_id ASC) AS water_rank FROM comparison ORDER BY gas_rank ASC

WITH line_facilities AS ( SELECT id AS facility_id FROM facilities WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND id >= 10000 AND MOD(id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 ), latest_per_facility AS ( SELECT em.* FROM line_facilities lf JOIN energy_measurements em ON em.id = ( SELECT lookup.id FROM energy_measurements lookup WHERE lookup.plant_id = #{plantId} AND lookup.facility_id = lf.facility_id AND lookup.measured_at >= #{from} AND lookup.measured_at < #{to} ORDER BY lookup.measured_at DESC, lookup.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) SELECT NULL AS id, plant_id, NULL AS facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at, NULL AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0) AS water_ton, NULL AS solar_kwh, NULL AS peak_kw, NULL AS created_at FROM latest_per_facility GROUP BY plant_id

SELECT f.id AS facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, CONCAT(f.name, ' 가스 계측기') AS meter_name, 'GAS' AS meter_type, COALESCE(l.gas_m3, 0) AS current_value, 'm3' AS unit, l.measured_at AS last_received_at, CASE WHEN l.measured_at IS NULL THEN 'NONE' WHEN l.measured_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'DELAY' END AS communication_status FROM facilities f LEFT JOIN energy_measurements l ON l.id = ( SELECT em.id FROM energy_measurements em WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} AND em.facility_id = f.id ORDER BY em.measured_at DESC, em.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE f.plant_id = #{plantId} AND f.id >= 10000 AND MOD(f.id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 UNION ALL SELECT f.id AS facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, CONCAT(f.name, ' 용수 계측기') AS meter_name, 'WATER' AS meter_type, COALESCE(l.water_ton, 0) AS current_value, 'ton' AS unit, l.measured_at AS last_received_at, CASE WHEN l.measured_at IS NULL THEN 'NONE' WHEN l.measured_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'DELAY' END AS communication_status FROM facilities f LEFT JOIN energy_measurements l ON l.id = ( SELECT em.id FROM energy_measurements em WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} AND em.facility_id = f.id ORDER BY em.measured_at DESC, em.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE f.plant_id = #{plantId} AND f.id >= 10000 AND MOD(f.id, 10000) BETWEEN 1 AND 24 ORDER BY facility_id ASC, meter_type ASC

WITH daily_usage AS ( SELECT DATE(summary_at) AS usage_date, COALESCE(gas_m3, 0) AS gas_usage_m3, COALESCE(water_ton, 0) AS water_usage_ton FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} ) SELECT usage_date, ROUND(gas_usage_m3, 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(water_usage_ton, 2) AS water_usage_ton, ROUND( CASE WHEN MAX(gas_usage_m3) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE gas_usage_m3 / MAX(gas_usage_m3) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS gas_usage_rate, ROUND( CASE WHEN MAX(water_usage_ton) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE water_usage_ton / MAX(water_usage_ton) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS water_usage_rate FROM daily_usage ORDER BY usage_date ASC

SELECT #{plantId} AS plant_id, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.electricity_kwh >= first.electricity_kwh THEN latest.electricity_kwh - first.electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS electricity_kwh, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.gas_m3 >= first.gas_m3 THEN latest.gas_m3 - first.gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS gas_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.water_ton >= first.water_ton THEN latest.water_ton - first.water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS water_ton, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.solar_kwh >= first.solar_kwh THEN latest.solar_kwh - first.solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS solar_kwh, MAX(latest.measured_at) AS latest_measured_at FROM ( SELECT facility_id, MAX(CASE WHEN first_rank = 1 THEN id END) AS first_id, MAX(CASE WHEN latest_rank = 1 THEN id END) AS latest_id FROM ( SELECT id, facility_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS first_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at DESC, id DESC ) AS latest_rank FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND ( facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 10000 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 10000 + 24) OR facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 100 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 100 + 4) ) ) ranked_points GROUP BY facility_id ) points JOIN energy_measurements first ON first.id = points.first_id JOIN energy_measurements latest ON latest.id = points.latest_id

SELECT HOUR(summary_at) AS usage_hour, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), 2) AS electricity_kwh, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), 2) AS gas_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), 2) AS water_ton, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), 2) AS solar_kwh FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND facility_id IS NULL AND summary_type = 'HOURLY' AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY HOUR(summary_at) ORDER BY usage_hour ASC

SELECT #{plantId} AS plant_id, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_electricity_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN electricity_kwh >= previous_electricity_kwh THEN electricity_kwh - previous_electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS electricity_kwh, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS gas_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS water_ton, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_solar_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN solar_kwh >= previous_solar_kwh THEN solar_kwh - previous_solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS solar_kwh, MAX(measured_at) AS latest_measured_at FROM ( SELECT measured_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, LAG(electricity_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_electricity_kwh, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton, LAG(solar_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_solar_kwh FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND ( facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 10000 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 10000 + 24) OR facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 100 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 100 + 4) ) ) ordered_measurements

SELECT points.usage_hour, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.electricity_kwh >= first.electricity_kwh THEN latest.electricity_kwh - first.electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS electricity_kwh, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.gas_m3 >= first.gas_m3 THEN latest.gas_m3 - first.gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS gas_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.water_ton >= first.water_ton THEN latest.water_ton - first.water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS water_ton, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest.solar_kwh >= first.solar_kwh THEN latest.solar_kwh - first.solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS solar_kwh FROM ( SELECT facility_id, HOUR(measured_at) AS usage_hour, MAX(CASE WHEN first_rank = 1 THEN id END) AS first_id, MAX(CASE WHEN latest_rank = 1 THEN id END) AS latest_id FROM ( SELECT id, facility_id, measured_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id, HOUR(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS first_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_id, HOUR(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at DESC, id DESC ) AS latest_rank FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND ( facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 10000 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 10000 + 24) OR facility_id BETWEEN (#{plantId} * 100 + 1) AND (#{plantId} * 100 + 4) ) ) ranked_points GROUP BY facility_id, HOUR(measured_at) ) points JOIN energy_measurements first ON first.id = points.first_id JOIN energy_measurements latest ON latest.id = points.latest_id GROUP BY points.usage_hour ORDER BY points.usage_hour ASC
